course_descriptor: J. Krishnamurti with David Bohm and David Shainberg, Brockwood Park 1976
deliverable_target: a faithful, source-conscious chapter sequence for The Transformation of Man, preserving the inquiry into consciousness, fragmentation, mechanical living, relationship, and transformation at the root.
visual_target: selected frames are supporting evidence for speaker identity, discussion setting, and official titling; do not let them override the spoken content.
mathematical_standard: preserve conceptual precision and distinctions, but avoid invented formal philosophy or psychology beyond the source.
style_target: notes should read like a careful companion text on consciousness, order, fragmentation, relationship, and fundamental transformation, with explicit separation between observation, dialogue, and interpretation.
credit_target: keep explicit credit to J. Krishnamurti, David Bohm, David Shainberg, the Krishnamurti Foundation Trust, and curation by LazyingArt LLC.
front_matter_single: Original discussion by J. Krishnamurti with David Bohm and David Shainberg. Lecture notes organized by \href{https://lazying.art}{LazyingArt LLC}.
front_matter_plural: Original discussions by J. Krishnamurti with David Bohm and David Shainberg. Lecture notes organized by \href{https://lazying.art}{LazyingArt LLC}.
